allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('expo:', p.dependencies.expo\); console.log\('reanimated:', p.dependencies['react-native-reanimated']\); console.log\('rn:', p.dependencies['react-native']\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('0.'\) or x.startswith\('~'\)][-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[x for x in v if '-' not in x]; print\(stable[-10:]\)")
